title: Roessleria armerioides
taxonomy: Roessleria armerioides belongs to the family Brachypodiaceae. However, some sources place it in the family Restionaceae. Further classification may be necessary for a definitive answer. The plant is considered to be a species of flowering plant. It is native to the southwestern parts of North America.

The plant's extracts have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
